title: Climate
help: Climate devices are added through Device Control → Gree / Pular tab. This page lists every device with entity_type=air_conditioner or thermostat plus its current state. Voice commands (“set temperature to 22 in bedroom”, “switch bedroom to cool mode”) are owned by the Device Control module — there is no separate climate intent layer.
empty: No climate devices yet — add one via Device Control → Gree / Pular.
